requirements.summary: Restore all frontend application code to match the exact state of Version 15 (the version immediately before Version 16)
acceptanceCriteria: All frontend code matches Version 15 state
All backend code matches Version 15 state

file_operations.description: Restore App.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any routing, provider, or configuration changes made in Version 16
Restore ClientsPage.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to client listing, search, or navigation logic
Restore ClientDossierPage.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to client detail display or intervention management
Restore DashboardPage.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to calendar display or intervention scheduling
Restore TechnicalFolderPage.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to file browser or folder navigation
Restore LoginPage.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any authentication flow changes
Restore InterventionList.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to intervention display or action handling
Restore AddInterventionDialog.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to intervention creation form or media handling
Restore EditInterventionDialog.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to intervention editing form
Restore InterventionDetailsDialog.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to intervention detail display
Restore CreateClientDialog.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to client creation form
Restore EditClientDialog.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to client editing form
Restore BlacklistPanel.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to blacklist display or management
Restore TechnicalFolderUploadCard.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to file upload UI or progress tracking
Restore TechnicalFileRow.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to file display or action buttons
Restore DocumentViewer.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to document viewing functionality
Restore MoveFolderDialog.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to folder move dialog
Restore CreateFolderDialog.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to folder creation dialog
Restore RenameFolderDialog.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to folder rename dialog
Restore MediaPicker.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to camera or gallery selection UI
Restore MediaPreview.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to media thumbnail display
Restore MobileLayout.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to layout structure, header, or footer
Restore ProfileSetupDialog.tsx to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to profile setup flow
Restore useInterventions.ts to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to intervention queries or mutations
Restore useClients.ts to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to client queries or mutations
Restore useTechnicalFolder.ts to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to technical folder operations
Restore useBlacklist.ts to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to blacklist mutations
Restore useCurrentUser.ts to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to user profile queries
Restore useActor.ts to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to backend actor management
Restore useInternetIdentity.ts to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to authentication logic
Restore useSync.ts to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to sync monitoring
Restore syncEngine.ts to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to offline operation processing
Restore outbox.ts to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to operation queue management
Restore db.ts to Version 15 state, reverting any changes to IndexedDB configuration
Restore index.css to Version 15 state, reverting any styling or theme changes
Restore tailwind.config.js to Version 15 state, reverting any Tailwind configuration changes
